mermaidSyntax:
graph TD
  M[Methodology Selection] --> Q{Method Type}
  Q -->|Quantitative| QM[Quantitative Methods]
  Q -->|Qualitative| QL[Qualitative Methods]
  Q -->|Mixed| MM[Mixed Methods]
  
  QM --> S[Surveys]
  QM --> E[Experiments]
  QM --> SA[Statistical Analysis]
  
  QL --> I[Interviews]
  QL --> FG[Focus Groups]
  QL --> TA[Thematic Analysis]
  
  MM --> QM
  MM --> QL
  
  S --> SA
  I --> TA
  
  SA --> RS[Results Synthesis]
  TA --> RS
  
  RS --> P[Publication]
  P -->|Feedback Loop| M
  
  style M fill:#6366f1,stroke:#4f46e5,color:#fff
  style Q fill:#8b5cf6,stroke:#7c3aed,color:#fff
  style RS fill:#f59e0b,stroke:#d97706,color:#000
  style P fill:#10b981,stroke:#059669,color:#fff
